products.name: Hydrophones & Transducers
products.descriptor: Hydrophones for reference measurement, passive arrays, and positioning/tracking systems

evidence.snippet:
### [Hydrophones & Transducers](/products/product-line/hydrophones-and-transducers)
Teledyne Marine manufactures a broad range of hydrophones. From oceanographic research to monitoring industrial processes, we have a range of hydrophones for reference measurement, reference projectors, passive arrays, positioning systems and tracking systems.

unresolved_questions: Specific RESON SeaBat product family names and SKUs (SeaBat T20, T51, T50-R, F20, D100, IDH T20/50-R, etc.) are referenced in crawl_index URL slugs and news article titles but were not available in any fetched text file — all product sub-category pages were skipped_class_budget.
NDAA and Blue UAS compliance status unknown for all products; no compliance claims appear on any fetched RESON page (only ISO 9001 certification is mentioned).
The TC4014 appears as an image filename on the RESON products page, suggesting it may be a specific hydrophone model, but no product description was available in the fetched corpus.
